titles.text: Negima!? Chou Mahora Taisen Chuu: Check-iin Zenin Shuugou! Yappari Onsen Kichaimashitaa

descriptions.text: A Nintendo DS game based on the anime series Negima

The 3-A students go on a hot spring trip to cure Negi's dislike of baths.However, a monster suddenly appears and the students are kidnapped! Negi, whose magic power has been sealed by a monster, challenges the enemy to battle with students equipped with magic gear! Will Negi and the 3-A students be able to save the captured students?
